title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Tama, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've seen the last of the moon tonight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Dragons gall forth storm clouds after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If I had taken another hit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I probably wouldn't be standing now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't feel bad about the moon, you fat cat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's not that your luck is bad,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's no longer in his sulong form!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just bit one of the four emperors!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does any- thing in the world still seem scary to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah, but that Dragon couldn't have been...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You hear that!? What a Rambin- Ctious brat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where the hell has he been?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You really think you have a chance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: As long as I'm still breathing..

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
